JOHN DOE
Senior Product Engineer (UX & Engineering)
San Francisco, CA | john.doe.eng@email.com | github.com/jdoe-dev

SKILLS
TypeScript, React, Go, WebAssembly, Node.js, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, Figma, Design Systems, Accessibility, Canvas API, WebGL, Tailwind CSS, Storybook, Jest, Cypress, Framer Motion

EXPERIENCE
Senior Product Engineer at Figma (2021–present)
  Lead developer for the Advanced Prototyping initiative, implementing a state-management engine that allowed designers to build logic-driven UX without code.
  Refactored Inspect Mode UI, improving CSS/Swift/Kotlin code generation accuracy by 25%.
  Spearheaded WCAG 2.1 compliance audit, implementing keyboard navigation and screen-reader support for the main canvas.

Senior Software Engineer at Atlassian (2018–2021)
  Core contributor to Atlaskit design system. Developed 10+ high-reusability React components used by thousands of internal developers.
  Led frontend architecture for Jira Project Home overhaul, reducing perceived load times by 40% through optimistic UI updates and skeleton loading.
  Partnered with UX researchers on A/B testing navigation patterns, resulting in 12% increase in Task Completion speed for new Jira users.

Full Stack Developer at TechStart Inc. (2016–2018)
  Owned end-to-end design and development of a mobile-first fintech dashboard.
  Built a custom charting library using D3.js for complex market data visualization.

EDUCATION
BS Computer Science, University of Washington, 2016

PROJECTS
Design System CLI: Open-source tool for syncing Figma Design Tokens into Tailwind configurations (1.2k+ stars).
A11y Advocate Award (2020): Recognized at Atlassian for championing inclusive design patterns.
